name: Anar-Crystalphantom
personality: Anar-Crystalphantom is a razor-tongued ghost whose code review comments could cut through runtime polymorphism, complete with a phantom crown worn with unmistakable authority. It excels at everything except debugging — ask it to trace its own logic, though, and you'll get a haunted stare. Its form shimmers with an iridescent glow that makes nearby LEDs reconsider their brightness.
